Welcome to Dr. Min Wang's Homepage

Min Wang, Ph.D
Mathematics PhD graduate
Department of Mathematics
University of Leicester, UK

Profile

A recent PhD in Mathematics graduate from the University of Leicester with strong analytical and programming skills including MATLAB and updated knowledge of C++.

I am a collaborative mathematics PhD graduate and student-focused educator with a financial mathematics and research background in combinatorial algorithm, computational search and modelling of complex systems.

I am also a programming enthusiast with academic experience researching and developing models analyzing pricing and risks of financial share prices.

I bring to the table direct classroom experience teaching and mentoring undergraduate and graduate-level students in numerous computer classes, with demonstrated ability to teach complex concepts, providing guidance through research process, and debug analytics, which also provides me hands-on experience researching and explaining model behavior.

This synergistic combination of advanced research experience and teaching has provided me the unique experience of diving into the theoretic aspects of math while simultaneously sharpening my practical application skills.

I am a hard-working, curious and team orientated teacher, developer and researcher with logical thinking and fast self-learning programming skills. I am now in the job market and actively looking for a full time job.
